description: VS Code extension AppHost debug console output is now cleaner and more informative. Debugger noise (module loads, banners, low-level logs) is filtered from the parent console while critical errors are preserved. TypeScript/Node pre-launch failures (e.g. tsc --noEmit errors) are now surfaced immediately instead of leaving the extension stuck at "Connecting to AppHost...".
name: Improved AppHost debug console output in VS Code
